name: Dazzling Shortbow
description:
This +1 striking shortbow is a favorite of mage hunters and those who frequently fight enemies who can turn themselves . A creature who is critically hit with a ranged Strike from a dazzling shortbow must succeed at a save or be for 1 minute.

Activate—Show Yourself! 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You fire an arrow that glows with purple light at a spot. Each creature in a within 60 feet is affected by (DC 19).

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of revealing light.
